allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; [print\(f['name'], f['type']\) for f in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f['name'], f['type']\) for f in data]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(type\(data\)\); [print\(f['name'], f['type']\) for f in data] if isinstance\(data,list\) else print\(data\)")
